main.name: Srikar Kusumanchi
main.description: Student by day, Freelancer by night
main.bio: A self-taught programmer and I have knowledge in several languages including the following: Python, C, SQL, Shell, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. I am currently a mobile developer that freelances. I like to create programs that are innovative, creating applications that solve real-world problems in this era of digital transformation. I have a deep passion for Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Robotics.
main.contactmessage: Love my work? Get in touch with me!

education.description: Captain of the Debate and MUN/YIG team. Top academic scholar of my class in 7th grade and top 10% academic scholar in 6th grade.

work.title: Lead SWE Intern
work.description: Edited and revised 30 hours worth of content to help aspiring developers learn quicker. Co-developing a website that will be used by thousands of students to sign up and learn Computer Science. Led a team of high school and college interns making the team 30 percent more productive.

work.title: MUN/YIG Captain
work.description: Led and mentored a 60+ member team on UN-related problems. Mentored students through creating slideshows and answering their questions when needed. Revised and edited people's resolution, speech, and summation.

work.title: Debate Captain
work.description: Researched and argued on a variety of international/domestic issues and captain of a 30 member team.

testimonials.text: Srikar has been one of the best freelancers I have ever had, his depth of knowledge in React Native is immense... I would definitely recommend you hire him for your next mobile app
Learning with Srikar has been AWESOME, he makes learning React Native so easy and approachable, you'll finally feel like you know what's going on!
